I saw the movie in the cinema when it came out. The reviews in Rotten Tomatoes were over 90% so we thought it must be really good. Specially after watching Infinity War which was good for being a superhero movie. We sat down, and after 30 mins we thought ok.. the movie must be a little slow and it will get better. One hours passes, then one hour and a half.. and then we realize the truth. The critic reviews were a scam. This one the most boring, predictable and lamest movie I have ever seen. The kind of movie I would switch off after half an hour, if I was not in a cinema. We were contemplating walking off, but we were already 2 hours in so we stayed. There are master pieces and Scorsese movies with scores on the 80s and 70s, and this piece of **** gets 90%+? This the moment I knew these scores were useless, and these big budget superhero movies have critics on their payroll
This last viewing was my favorite viewing of this film.

Cara, eu nem sei o que comentar sobre. Começar lá em O Homem de Ferro e terminar agora Vingadores Ultimato, depois de todos esses filmes, é uma sensação inexplicável. Eu ainda estou em choque tentando assimilar cada momento. Não tem o que comentar, eu não consigo comentar. Tudo PERFEITO. A abertura dos portais, a entrada da Capitã Marvel, aquele momento de todas as heroínas lutando juntas, a morte do Homem de Ferro… Eu ainda estou tentando entender que acabou. Por mais que continue com a saga do multiverso, a saga do infinito, com os principais e primeiros heróis, acabou. Repetindo: não tenho palavras para descrever o que estou sentindo.
